name: Database — PostgreSQL / SQLite
summary: List, query, and inspect databases on this server. Use command.run.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available databases. Use for: 'show databases', 'list DBs', 'what databases exist'.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Run a read-only SQL query against a named database.
commands.example: {"plan": [{"action": "command.run", "params": {"cmd": "navig db query 'mydb' 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users'"}, "description": "Query database"}], "message": "Querying database"}
